<!-- =========================================================================
     ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS
     Demonstrates a multi-column layout. `layout="[[55, 2, 45]]"` = one row with
     three columns of relative width 55 / 2 (spacer) / 45. Each named `:::` block
     with an id fills one column, in order.
     ========================================================================= -->

The layout below splits the credits into two columns with a thin spacer between them.

::: {layout="[[55, 2, 45]]"}
::::: {#first-column}
### Team {.unlisted .unnumbered}

- **Ada Lovelace** --- *Project Lead*
- **Alan Turing** --- *Research Engineer*
- **Grace Hopper** --- *ML Engineer*
- **Katherine Johnson** --- *Data Scientist*
:::::

::::: {#spacer-column}
:::::

::::: {#third-column}
### Partners {.unlisted .unnumbered}

- **Example Institute**
- **Placeholder Labs**

### Funding {.unlisted .unnumbered}

- Grant No. 000-0000, Example Funding Agency
:::::
:::
